title: The Top 10 Claude Code Plugins to 10x Your Next Project (June '26)
summary: Chase AI reviews ten Claude Code plugins designed to improve code project workflows, including Graphify for knowledge graph generation from code bases, grill-me for skill extraction, various code indexing and integration tools, and n8n MCP for workflow automation. The video focuses on solving Claude Code's memory constraints through non-RAG and RAG-assisted approaches.
writeup: Chase AI reviews ten plugins for extending Claude Code, including Graphify for knowledge graph generation, grill-me for skill querying, a Codex plugin, claude-obsidian, NotebookLM integration, and n8n MCP. The throughline is solving Claude Code's memory limitations through non-RAG approaches such as knowledge graphs. Concepts covered include memory systems, the Claude API, and the Model Context Protocol.
